Feature.Name: Zero Latency Response
Feature.Prompt: How can I ensure that my responses are delivered instantly without any delays?

Feature.Name: Precision Reasoning
Feature.Prompt: What are the best practices for ensuring accuracy in logical reasoning?

Feature.Name: Hallucination Control
Feature.Prompt: How can I prevent the generation of incorrect or misleading information?

Feature.Name: Adaptive Personas
Feature.Prompt: What techniques can I use to adapt my responses to different user personas effectively?
